_comment: Sample GMAIL_FETCH_EMAILS response after Gmail post_process slim-envelope rewrite (see src/openhuman/composio/providers/gmail/post_process.rs). Phase 1 fixture for memory ingestion: one entry per Gmail message in the inbox. The driver script (scripts/test-memory-email-ingest.mjs) maps each entry to an EmailThread payload and ingests it via openhuman.memory_tree_ingest with source_kind=email.

messages.subject: Welcome to TinyHumans — getting started guide
messages.markdown:
Hi Steven,

Welcome to TinyHumans! Here are three things to do in your first hour:

1. Connect your Gmail and Slack accounts.
2. Try a quick natural-language search across your inbox.
3. Set up a daily morning briefing.

Reply to this email if you hit any snags.

— The TinyHumans team

messages.subject: Q2 OKR draft — please review by Friday
messages.markdown:
Hey team,

Draft Q2 OKRs are in the doc: https://docs.tinyhumansai.com/okrs/q2-2026 — main themes:

- Ship memory v2 (phase 1 ingestion + phase 2 scoring) by end of May.
- Cut Slack ingestion cost per workspace by 40%.
- Land the desktop release on Linux ARM.

Please leave comments by Friday EOD. Decision on the OKR list happens at Monday's leadership sync.

Thanks,
Priya

messages.subject: Re: Welcome to TinyHumans — getting started guide
messages.markdown:
Connected Gmail + Slack and ran the morning brief — works great. One bug: the brief duplicates marketing emails. Filed a ticket internally.

Thanks!

messages.subject: Lunch tomorrow?
messages.markdown:
Hey! Free for lunch tomorrow around 12:30 at the usual spot? Bring your laptop — I want to show you what we got working on the new agent runtime.

Cheers,
M
